emails.subject: Axis Capital Market Commentary – February 2026
emails.body_text:
Axis Capital – February 2026 Market Commentary

Professional services sector M&A activity slowed in January, with deal volume down 9% year-over-year. However, management consulting subsector remains active with several mid-market platform acquisitions announced.

Interest rate environment: The Fed held rates steady at its February meeting. Most analysts now expect 1–2 cuts in H2 2026.

This commentary is for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial advice.

Axis Capital Research

Cascade Cloud Support Team

emails.subject: Highland Risk Solutions – Dispute Resolution: Q1 Premium Amount
emails.body_text:
Dear Accounts Payable,

We received your inquiry regarding the Q1 2026 premium amount. We understand there may be a discrepancy between the amount billed ($9,250.00) and what was expected based on your records.

Per our rate schedule effective January 1, 2026, professional liability premiums for firms with revenue between $10M–$25M are $9,250 per quarter. This reflects a 5% adjustment from Q4 2025 rates.

Please contact Christine Holloway at c.holloway@highlandrisk.com to discuss further.

Highland Risk Solutions

Beginning April 1, 2026, multi-factor authentication (MFA) will be required for all administrator accounts on the Cascade platform. Accounts without MFA enabled will be locked at that time.

Action required: Enable MFA in your account settings before April 1. Setup instructions are available at cascadecloud.com/mfa-setup.

If you need assistance, contact security@cascadecloud.com.

Cascade Cloud Solutions Security Team

emails.subject: Update
emails.body_text:
Hello,
We wanted to let you know about an upcoming adjustment affecting Copy Paper, 8.5"×11", 20 lb, Case/10 Reams.
Due to ongoing supply chain difficulties—including higher raw material costs, transportation constraints, and vendor disruptions—our cost to source this product has risen significantly. As a result, the unit amount for this item has gone from $59.99 to $79.99 per case.
We have worked to absorb as much of these pressures as possible and delayed this update where we could. Unfortunately, current conditions make this revision necessary to maintain consistent availability and service levels.
If you have any questions or would like to discuss options, feel free to reach out.
Thank you for your understanding.
Best,
Catharine Scott
Main Street Office Products
